feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Parent Trap
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,992Chapters: 13/15Kudos: 631

Summary: When Dick Grayson forces Clark to pretend to be his parent for a meeting with his headmaster, Clark expects an awkward conversation and maybe a lecture from Bruce afterward. He does not expect Gotham’s tabloids to decide he and Bruce Wayne are secretly together. But after one too many headlines about Bruce Wayne’s “mysterious co-parent,” pretending to date starts seeming like the easiest solution. That would probably be less of a problem if Clark wasn’t already half in love with him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The New Son of Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Sally_Boomer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,100Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 397

Summary: Superman whipped the condensation on the healing-vessel window with a shaky hand, the oppression on his chest only growing more overwhelming the more he cleared the view. Then he saw it. There, floating in the fluid, was a foetus. “Kelex.” Kal’s voice came broken and strangled, and a little hysterical, “Kelex, what is inside?” “A Kryptonian-human, Kal-El.” Replied the AI, “A descendant designed to better adapt to the planet chosen to board the House of El. A new type of Kryptonian for a new planet.” “A hybrid for…” Started Kal, only to stop mid-sentence, suddenly assaulted by a dreadful realisation. “Which human? Whose DNA did you take for this? From whom did you take the human sample?” “Your chosen mate, Kal-El. Batman.” Kelex answered without pause, as if the answer was obvious. ---- Superman, who has been secretly in love with his best friend for over a decade, accidentally baby traps Batman with a human-kryptonian child. Or Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne are Conner Wayne's biological parents, and they may or may not fall in love while raising their child together.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Kinæsthesia
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,618Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 157

Summary: "You are your own worst enemy."- Martha Kent Clark comes home to a city still wearing his symbol like a wound. Bruce comes home to Clark. It takes both of them longer than it should. Features: an opinionated elderly neighbor, a neighborhood that gives a damn, a word in Kryptonian that doesn't translate cleanly, and two men who are catastrophically bad at being afraid in front of each other. The longer version: After the Fortress, after the city's grief and the shaharreth on every wall, Clark Kent comes back to Metropolis and tries to figure out what home means for someone like him. Bruce Wayne is apparently part of that answer. Clark is working on accepting this. This is a story about the specific courage of choosing someone who will die before you do. About the difference between happiness and contentment. About the people who show up for you in your building hallway at six in the morning and the people who put a transponder in your cape because they can't say I was afraid for you any other way. Martha Kent called it. She usually does.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Love Me For Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,080Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Bruce Wayne died destroying a Xenomorph Queen. Clark Kent mourned him with Kryptonian ritual and carried the key to the Batcave against his sternum for nine days. Then Jason Todd brought Bruce back. Resurrection via Lazarus Pit is never clean. Bruce returns with his memories intact and a rage that displaces every other emotion. The two-meter distance that kept Clark alive in the hive becomes the boundary that keeps Bruce from violence. The team fractures over the ethics of resurrection without consent. And in the Pacific Northwest, something new is hunting—parasitic neural infiltrators that enter through the ear canal and leave their hosts conscious during control. Bruce volunteers as bait. Clark shadows him every meter. The key stays cold against Clark's chest. And somewhere in the Cascade Range, a Yautja marks Batman as worthy prey. "You were wrong to do it. But I'm glad you did." Love that persists despite impossibility. Love that consumes despite resistance. Love that exists in darkness and is overcome by forces larger than itself. This is what remains.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,256Chapters: 20/30Kudos: 602

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: Assignations
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,041Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Saul DiGennaro has been in this life 32 years. He knows what the rules cost and who pays them and what happens to men who forget they agreed to pay. He also knows what money looks like when it moves wrong. What a city looks like when the thing underneath it has been there longer than the families and will be there after them. He's been telling a reporter named Clark Kent about it, in diners and bars and one significantly better coffee place, across eight months of conversations that are not on the record and then are and then aren't again depending on the specific weight of what's being said. He did two weeks in Gotham County. He came out intact. What he heard in there — from women transferring through from state units with no running water and mess halls that ran out of food and guards who waited three hours while a woman seized — that's in the notebook now. He keeps running into Matches Malone in alleys and stairwells and the back seats of Suburbans and one supply closet during an active heist, and Matches keeps having what appears to be a recurring and energetic arrangement with Tony the Ace, and Saul keeps filing it under the drawer that doesn't have a label yet.

entry.title: The Scott Summers Incident
entry.summary:
Author: JustGettingBy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,830Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Superman takes a hit to the head while on a mission, and the resulting injury causes damage and chaos. While the team rushes to find a fix, Superman will just have to stay in the safest place—the Batcave—while he convalesces. Bruce will be completely normal about this. Obviously.

entry.title: World's Finest
entry.summary:
Author: Titanbreaker

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,457Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 14

Summary: The final chapters of the Gotham Princess series.Thanks to Vicki Vale, Bryce Wayne and Clark Kent’s budding romance has been thrust into the spotlight, creating an overnight sensation. entry.summary:
Author: Philis283

Summary: Based on 'The Kryptonians who invaded Earth' the Kryptonians have run out of Omega's due to an unexplained viruses, so the travel to planets to find a comparable species which happens to be Earth. Where Kal finds his dream Omega called Bruce Wayne.

entry.title: rising bids, rising tensions
entry.summary:
Author: 4LiberTEA

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,560Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 114

Summary: "It's so nice of you guys to come all the way out here for our humble autumn festival," Clark said, a fond smile brightening his face. "You'll see, it's heaps of fun!" "Yes, well, we couldn't miss watching you get auctioned off to one of Smallville's lucky ladies," responded Bruce with a wily smirk just as Clark's smile plummeted. "Who do you think will bid the highest? Jeanette from Seniors' Bingo, or Eleanor from the Baptist Church?" Red hot embarrassment crept across Clark's face as he whispered accusingly, "How did you find out about that?" "Oh, please. Did you really think you could keep this from the world's greatest detective?" "More like the world's greatest—" "Alright kiddos! I think it's about high time you both get to trying out those rides." Martha placed one hand on the back of each of Bruce's kids and began guiding them toward the amusement rides. * OR, Bruce and Lex engage in a bid-off to be Smallville's "lucky lady" and win Clark on a date.

entry.title: Please dodge my bullets (Part 1)
entry.summary:
Author: maziemme

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,476Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 39

Summary: Based on the Tumblr post by lily-orchard: Bad Idea For A Romantic Comedy- The chief of police is married to a mob boss, and they have to keep "just failing" to catch each other. When one of them hits the other in a shootout, it's followed by "Oh, I'm never going to hear the end of this..." // "So... how was your day at work?" // "YOU FUCKING SHOT ME!! THAT WAS MY DAY AT WORK!!" But make it Mob Boss Bruce Wayne and Police Officer Clark Kent in New York. And a lot more dramatic and sad. ✦✦Reccomending and commenting motivante to write more. Share your thoughts and ideas!✦✦

entry.title: Merboy
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,024Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 58

Summary: “You know,” Clark said slowly, putting his hand on his hips. “I am, trying to help!”The boy immediately bared his sharp teeth, letting out a low growl, and glared at Clark.“Look— it’s either you want me to help or you can stay stuck here forever,” Clark threatened knowing the fact that he would never do that. The boy folded his arms, his eyes glancing at the rock trapping him as he sat silent.-Or, an AU where Bruce is a merman and secretly childhood friends with Clark. But then Bruce disappeared ever since he told Clark about the death of his parents, yet Clark still waited, for years.

entry.title: we have time
entry.summary:
Author: Thank_yuze

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,221Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 98

Summary: “‘M so close- please, B, I’m so close, please.” Clark sobbed helplessly, Bruce’s face growing blurry as tears clouded his eyes. A reedy keen tore itself out of Clark’s throat as Bruce- as Bruce stopped, letting Clark slip out of him. He sat firmly in Clark's lap, pinning him down with his weight. Clark let out a loud whine as his hips cant up, instinctually searching for the hot friction of Bruce’s channel. Bruce shushed him softly, petting down the wide expanse of his sweaty chest. There he stayed, unmoving and cruel, until Clark’s desperate, pleading sobs at being denied again turned into pathetic little sniffles.

entry.title: What Becomes of the Unready
entry.summary:
Author: NewYorke

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,766Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 63

Summary: “When a fledgling leaves the nest, there isn’t much the parent can do. They gave it warmth, shelter, and every scrap of knowledge they knew. But there comes a point where the sky calls, and the chick must answer alone. It will either follow its instincts and take flight, or plummet into the jaws of a world hungry without mercy.” —--- You’d been on plenty of watches in the rain, knew how to keep your footing while leaping from rooftop to rooftop. This was Gotham, after all–the city had its own kind of plot armor, keeping the streets as sullen as humanly possible. To have a patrol without rain was to have coffee without sugar.   Tonight, though, you were flying solo. Bruce would’ve permanently benched you if he knew, but honestly… whatever. You’d solved cases on your own before, tailed bad guys, peeked at the cams. How different could it be? You could *see* Bruce from where you were anyways. It was a little harmless shadowing, what he didn’t know couldn’t hurt him. You’d slip back into the manor before they started to head back. Besides, the team was still nearby, somewhere in the shadows.   Aka: Joker finally catches a chick the moment it drops from the nest

entry.title: Cantos of the Damned: A SuperBat Retelling of Dante's Inferno
entry.summary:
Author: EllEmmeFujo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,294Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 7

Summary: A bet is placed. Batman is dead and finds himself in hell. With Constantine as his guide, he must find the person he treasures most and save them...even if it means damning himself to an eternity of fire and brimstone.

entry.title: the best parts of lonely
entry.summary:
Author: Ferox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,691Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 406

Summary: Clark Kent has a pretty great thing going for him. He's the backup goalie for the Gotham Blades, the worst team in NHL history, and he's working on his journalism degree. He never has to worry about money and he's got plenty of free time to be Superman and partner with the Justice League. It's all going really well. Until Bruce Wayne ruins everything. “When I asked you what you wanted for your birthday, you said you wanted the Blades to,” Bruce used air quotes which shouldn't be endearing, “win an ‘effing’ game for once in your life.” "What,” Jason barks out a laugh, “you’re gonna bribe a ref or somethin’?” “Goodness no!” Bruce cries out dramatically clutching his hands to his chest, utterly scandalized. “What do you take me for? A criminal? Of course not, Jason. I would never! I am a good influence.” Jason continues to glare at him, clearly waiting for something. “I bought the team,” Bruce announces.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent & Jason Todd & Bruce Wayne

entry.title: one day i am gonna grow wings (this is how it feels to take the fall)
entry.summary:
Author: no_imnotafraidtodisappear

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,814Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 194

Summary: Neil Josten wasn’t stupid.Neil Josten knew how to nurse himself back to health after that night in January. He made his own suits, he made his own webs. Neil Josten put his life back together piece by piece, all by himself.Neil Josten had survived.Even so Neil Josten knew he should’ve kept running. Neil Josten should’ve known his time was running out. Neil Josten should’ve heeded his mother’s advice instead of sticking out like a sore thumb, even with his mask on.No, Neil Josten wasn’t stupid. Neil Josten was dumb.——————————————————Neil has been Spider-man (and alone) for quite sometime. One mission goes sideways and New York's not-so-friendly Spider-man dies. Neil wakes up in New Jersey... in another universe. Many problems arise.Please mind the tags. There will be some graphic stuff. I try to put TWs at the beginning of the chapter, though. You have been warned. Slow updates. this fic is inspired by both of these fics:Hope Was A Dangerous, Disquieting Thing by BisexualChaosDemonLeap of Faith by alighterwood and ErinWantsToWrite

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
